evidence_assessment.description: Is the evidence tier claimed by the developer actually supported?

evidence_gaps.description: What evidence is missing or insufficient

test_coverage_gaps.description: Untested paths, missing error cases, missing edge cases

patch_risks.description: Potential issues with the proposed fix

independent_fix_proposal.description: Reviewer's own fix approach if they disagree with the developer's. Empty if they agree.

cross_arch_risks.description: Risks on other architectures (aarch64, x86_64, loongarch64)

next_prompt_to_developer.description: Specific instructions for the developer in the next round
